name: order-67-research-harness
description: Rigor-aware AI/ML research harness (working name "Proteus Harness"). Ports the order-66 SDD machinery to scientific research: the atomic unit is an EXPERIMENT (analogous to a slice) governed by a falsifiable HYPOTHESIS (analogous to an EARS requirement), and the load-bearing `mode` becomes a `rigor_tier` enum (exploratory | pilot | confirmatory | publication) carried in experiment.json that cumulatively tightens every downstream gate. Skills: /triage (7-path research-question routing + tier recommendation), /register (pre-registration hash-lock + falsifiable H-NNN cards), /design-experiment (quicklook-first design + Data&Compute plan + threats-to-validity), /data-audit (Kapoor-Narayanan L1/L2/L3 leakage gate + secret scan), /plan-runs (best-first experiment tree with _Owns:_/_Depends:_/_Tier:_/(P)), /conflicts (cross-experiment invariant scanner), /execute (autonomous-within-budget run loop; owns the remote SSH/GPU launch+poll+fetch via a host-config file; spawns the independent verifier before recording any claim), /confound-audit (mandatory permutation-null + nuisance-screen + statistic-swap on every positive finding), /analyze (effect-size + CI + FDR statistics and Ten-Simple-Rules-linted figures), /verify-claim, /paper (IMRaD claims-carry-stats + NeurIPS 16-item checklist), /brief (BLUF/Minto layman R&D-management HTML + pushback handbook), /drift (DREAM consolidation + retraction-citation sweep), /atlas (v2 single-pane project control surface, three artifacts under experiments/_atlas/: STATUS.md thin board from the hand-curated atlas.yaml ledger via atlas.py — you-are-here + exploration TREE incl. dead-ends/backtracks with why + status + method battery + parking lot + drift check; ATLAS.md THE deep dossier — full hypothesis cards, cited pipeline walks into the actual run code, verbatim statistics, mandatory what-the-numbers-mean-computed derivation tables, prereg-vs-post-hoc constants, runs+verdicts ledgers, Run-Note gotchas; ATLAS.html its deterministic house-editorial render via render_html.py), /note. Agents: results-verifier (never-self-grade, PROMOTE/PROMOTE-WITH-CAVEAT/RERUN/REJECT/BLOCKED), data-steward, reproducibility-checker, peer-reviewer (red-team), figure-smith, run-reader. A validating block-lint hook checks the named `## Block` ABI (field presence plus load-bearing value constraints — the verdict enums and the data-audit leakage gate) before an expensive run consumes a drifted block. See ROADMAP.md and CONVENTIONS.md.
